title: phyla strigulosa var. sericea
intro: Phyla strigulosa var. sericea, also known as Texas frog's bladderwort or silky phyla, is a perennial herb in the Lamiaceae family native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and coughs, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phyla strigulosa var. sericea include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications.
